misconfig_patterns: Loopback-only default: auth token required for non-loopback connections (conditional)
Expose via reverse proxy without configuring COZO_AUTH = fully open
/export/{rel} dumps entire relation without auth if token not set

active_probe.false_positive_check: response must include ok:true, rows, and headers fields — unique to CozoDB Datalog response format

deployment_tells: POST /text-query with Datalog query returns {ok:true, rows:[], headers:[]} structure
Auth token conditional — loopback deployments are open, port-forwarded deployments may be
HNSW vector index support via hnsw() relation
pivot_paths: POST /text-query body=?[k,v] := *sys:relations[k,v] → list all stored relations
GET /export/{rel} → full relation dump as JSON without auth (if no token)
POST /text-query → Datalog query arbitrary stored data
